toolchain.firtool: CIRCT firtool-1.135.0 (auto-resolved by firtool-resolver from Chisel 7.3.0)

contents.flat/DefaultConfig.flat.sv.gz: single-file XSTop, gzipped (2009 modules); see note on size below
contents.filelist.f: the generator's own filelist -- INCOMPLETE, see notes
contents.meta/git-provenance.txt: git log/diff header emitted by the XiangShan Makefile

notes: Built via 'make verilog' (FPGATOP=top.TopMain) -> XSTop, the SoC top. This is NOT SimTop: no difftest comparison harness.

filelist.f is INCOMPLETE: it omits ClockGate.sv and all DiffExt*.v. The DiffExt*.v modules ARE instantiated (by DummyDPICWrapper_* modules that filelist.f does list), so compiling filelist.f alone leaves undefined modules. Compile all of rtl/ instead, or use flat/.
SRAMs are behavioral models (ram_*.sv). Fine for simulation/formal; not synthesizable to a PDK without SRAM replacement.
flat/ is gzipped because the raw file is 101-155 MB, over GitHub's 100 MB per-file limit. gunzip -k flat/DefaultConfig.flat.sv.gz to use it.
XSTop.fir (FIRRTL, 1.0-1.5 GB raw) is intentionally not frozen. Regenerate with the build_command above if needed.
Verified: verilator --lint-only --top-module XSTop on flat/ reports 0 errors.

supported_flow.status: PASS — XiangShan RTL at this commit simulates and boots real workloads
supported_flow.how: XiangShan's own flow: `make emu` builds SimTop (core + difftest + simulated MMIO/flash) and runs against NEMU as a golden reference, checking every retired instruction.
results: coremark-2-iteration: HIT GOOD TRAP @0x80001ca0, 663,691 instrs, IPC 1.314, CoreMark 469 iters/sec
microbench: HIT GOOD TRAP @0x80003a4e, 326,376 instrs, IPC 0.960
supported_flow.reproduce: sim/xs_emu.pbs (note: difftest needs Verilator >= ~5.048; chipyard's 5.022 pin is too old — waveform.h uses VerilatedTraceBaseC)

frozen_xstop_standalone.status: PARTIAL — elaborates, lints clean, resets and fetches correctly, but does not retire from a bare AXI testbench
frozen_xstop_standalone.verified_working: Waveform-confirmed: io_reset_vector=0x80000000 reaches the core, core reset deasserts at cycle 202 (frontend 228), hartResetReq=0 throughout, and the frontend issues 4 correct 64B fetches at 0x80000000/40/80/c0 through L1I->L2->AXI.
frozen_xstop_standalone.symptom: Zero instructions retired and zero stores, while the design stays highly active (~265k signal transitions per 500 cycles).
ruled_out: debug module holding the hart (hartResetReq=0 in waveform)
DFT reset (dft_mode/dft_scan_mode both 0, so dft_lgc_rst_n is ignored)
PMA denying execution (init constants 8'h6F / 46'h20000000000 present; DRAM executable)
test-program bugs (disassembly verified; marker-store program proves no execution at all)
missing Smrnmi/Smdbltrp boot prologue (replicated the flash bootrom's mnstatus.NMIE set + mstatus.MDT clear byte-exactly; no change)
Verilator defines (ENABLE_INITIAL_REG_ is self-defined by the RTL when SYNTHESIS is unset)
frozen_xstop_standalone.note: XSTop is the FPGA-platform top; XiangShan boots it from flash at 0x10000000, not directly from DRAM. Use the supported `make emu` flow above for a XiangShan simulation that runs.
frozen_xstop_standalone.testbench: sim/tb_xstop.sv (AXI4 DRAM model, ndmreset feedback, live TCK, div-100 rtc)
